message:
test: add cross-module integration test for circuit breaker → retry → GC

Chains CircuitBreaker, RetryPolicy, compact_u64_map, should_vacuum, and
CacheGcSettings to verify the reliability + cleanup pipeline. 6 tests
covering circuit-state-driven retry selection, GC cleanup after circuit
recovery, config-driven vacuum decisions, full pipeline flow, independent
multi-circuit caches, and retry delay bounding across circuit cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
